title: CAT(Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Third Amendment Rules, 1988

(1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vire- Chairmen and Members) Third Amendment Rules, 1988.
